tool.name: neuroBEAT
tool.command:
set -e
echo "COMMAND STARTED" && echo "Tool dir: $__tool_directory__" && echo "mode: $mode" && echo "exp_name: $exp_name" && echo "utils: $__tool_directory__/R/utils" && echo "zip version: " && zip --version &&
mkdir -p '$exp_name/raw_data_ZebraBox' && mkdir -p '$exp_name/logsheets' && mkdir -p '$exp_name/aesthetic_files' &&
#for $i, $raw in enumerate($raw_data_ZebraBox) cp '$raw' $exp_name/raw_data_ZebraBox/${raw.element_identifier}; #end for
#for $i, $log in enumerate($logsheets) cp '$log' $exp_name/logsheets/${log.element_identifier}; #end for
cp '$__tool_directory__/inst/aesthetic_files/'*.csv '$exp_name/aesthetic_files/' &&
#if $conc_data cp '$conc_data' '$exp_name/aesthetic_files/conc_data.csv' && #end if
R CMD INSTALL '$__tool_directory__' && Rscript '$__tool_directory__/00_mainCLI_forGalaxy.R' --mode '$mode' --name '$exp_name' --utils '$__tool_directory__/R/utils' &&
zip -r neurobeat_results.zip '$exp_name' && mv neurobeat_results.zip '$results'

param.name: logsheets
param.label: Log sheets - must match number of zebrabox files

param.name: aesthetic_zip
param.label: Aesthetic files (ZIP, optional)
param.help: Upload a ZIP containing all 7 aesthetic CSVs at the top level. Leave empty to use the defaults shipped with the tool. Individual files below override anything from this ZIP.

param.name: conc_data
param.label: conc_data.csv (optional override)
param.help: Optional override for the conc_data file if specific colors are desired. If provided, will be used instead of the default concentration data that is created based on the the logsheets.

param.name: endpoint_list
param.value: BSL1 BSL2 BSL3 BSL4 VMR1 VMR2 VMR3 VMR4 VMR5
param.label: Endpoint list

tool.help:
neuroBEAT is a pipeline for analyzing zebrafish behavior data. It provides a comprehensive set of tools for preprocessing, analysis, and visualization such as concentration-response curves.
REQUIRED ARGUMENTS --raw_data_ZebraBox FILE One or more raw ZebraBox files from ZebraBox --logsheets FILE Treatment lists for each experimental group. The number of loghseets must match the number of ZebraBox files. --exp_name STR Experiment name
OPTIONAL ARGUMENTS --mode STR Analysis mode (e.g., violins_all, scatterplot) [all] Modes: all Run the entire pipeline. plot_timeseries Generate time-series line plots. GAMM_model Fit GAMM and create prediction plots. CRC_phases Concentration–response modeling for time-series (phase) endpoints. violin_plots_phases Violin/box plots for phase endpoints. CRC_LM Concentration–response modeling for single-value endpoints (linear models). CR_modeling_all Concentration–response modeling for all endpoint types (combines CRC_phases and CRC_LM). violins_SV Violin/box plots for single-value endpoints. violins_all Violin/box plots for all endpoint types.
--conc_data FILE Concentration data file [NULL] File that assigns colors to each group of var1, var2. This file is generated automatically with random color assignment, but can be uploaded for specific color customization.
--healthyAnimalScore INT Morphology score(s) of larvae to keep: 0 = normal 1 = no swim bladder 2 = abnormal 3 = 1 + 2 4 = dead 5 = other One or more values, space-separated. [0]
--unit_var1 STR Unit label for var1 (e.g. uM -> µM). Use '' or 'none' if unitless. [µM] --control_var1 STR Value of var1 used as the control. [0] --control_var2 STR Control value for var2 (only if var2 varies). [NULL] --y_max INT Maximum y-axis limit for plots (6 for 0–600 range, 8 for 0–800 range). [8] --endpoint_list STR Endpoints to include in the GAMM, space-separated. [BSL1 BSL2 BSL3 BSL4 VMR1 VMR2 VMR3 VMR4 VMR5] --binsize INT Number of seconds to bin together (e.g., 60 = sum distance moved per minute). [60] --phase_name STR Name for the phase range used in file names (e.g., BSL1_VMR5 if the whole dark-light-dark phase should be modeled). [BSL1_VMR5] --x_axis_title STR X-axis title for plots. [Time (s)] --y_axis_title STR Y-axis title for plots. [Motor activity (px/min)] --var1_def STR Definition of var1 shown next to violin plots (e.g. 'c' for concentration). [c]
